---
title: "About Me"
---

## About Me

I am a motivated student with a growing interest in **data analysis, web technologies, and professional digital presentation**. This portfolio reflects the technical and creative skills I have developed through building a structured website and presenting projects in a clear and professional way.

::: {.callout-tip}
My main strengths include **organisation, adaptability, problem-solving, and willingness to learn new tools**.
:::

## Skills

| Skill | Description |
|---|---|
| Quarto | Building and publishing structured websites |
| Git & GitHub | Managing files, commits, and version control |
| Python | Data analysis and visualisation |
| Web Design | Layout, styling, and presentation |
| Communication | Explaining ideas clearly and professionally |

## Academic and Professional Goals

My goal is to continue developing technical and analytical skills that will support both my academic progress and future career opportunities. I want to improve my confidence in presenting projects, solving technical problems, and using digital tools in a professional setting.

## What this portfolio represents

This ePortfolio demonstrates not only completed work, but also my progress in learning how to plan, build, refine, and present digital projects effectively.
